stem: A plumber charges $180 for the first two hours of work plus an hourly fee for each additional hour. The total cost for 6 hours of work is $420. Which function f gives the total cost, in dollars, for x hours of work, where x ≥ 2?
rationale:
Choice C is correct. The hourly fee for hours beyond the first two is (420 - 180)/(6 - 2) = 240/4 = 60 dollars per hour. So f(x) = 180 + 60(x - 2). Verify: f(6) = 180 + 60(4) = 420 ✓; f(2) = 180 ✓.

Choice A applies $90 per hour to all hours. Choice B uses the wrong base fee. Choice D incorrectly charges $60 starting at x = 0.
